channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SRF] SRF Ltd: Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
SRF Ltd has announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors, in its meeting, approved the results and recommended a "Nil" final dividend. The results and auditor's report are available on the company's website.

  • SRF Ltd declares audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Board of Directors recommended a "Nil" final dividend.
  • Auditor's report with unmodified opinion enclosed.
  • Results are available on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SRF LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [JUBLINGREA] Jubilant Ingrevia: Faces ₹2.03 Cr GST Demand for FY18
item.description:
Jubilant Ingrevia Ltd has received an order from the Additional Commissioner, State Tax, Moradabad, confirming a demand for Goods and Service Tax on Transitional Credit availed and utilized, along with penalty and interest, for the financial year 2017-18. The total demand includes ₹1,01,84,776 in tax and an equivalent amount as penalty, plus applicable interest, totaling ₹2,03,69,552 plus interest. The company plans to appeal the order before the GSTAT, believing it has a strong case. The order was received on May 4, 2026, and the company does not anticipate a material financial or operational impact.

  • Jubilant Ingrevia faces GST demand of ₹1,01,84,776 plus penalty of ₹1,01,84,776 and applicable interest for FY18.
  • The demand relates to alleged wrong availment and utilisation of Transitional Input Tax Credit.
  • Jubilant Ingrevia plans to appeal the order before the GSTAT.
  • The company believes it has a strong case and anticipates no material financial impact.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jubilant Ingrevia Ltd | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [J&KBANK] J&K Bank Audited Results for FY26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd has released its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The results were approved by the Board of Directors on May 5, 2026, in a meeting held from 11:00 A.M. to 03:40 P.M. The audit report includes opinions on the standalone financial results, with compliance to SEBI regulations and accounting standards.

  • Audited financial results (standalone & consolidated) for FY26 released.
  • Board approved results on May 5, 2026.
  • Compliance with SEBI regulations and accounting standards.
  • Independent Auditor's Report on Standalone Financial Results included.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAMMU & KASHMIR BANK LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CIL] Citizen Infoline Changes Name to Citizen Solar After Merger
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Citizen Infoline Ltd. has changed its name to Citizen Solar Limited following the approval of a Scheme of Amalgamation by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ahmedabad Bench. The Registrar of Companies approved the name change, effective from the date of the fresh Certificate of Incorporation issued on May 4, 2026. The company's new name will be reflected in all future records and correspondences.

  • Citizen Infoline changes name to Citizen Solar post-amalgamation.
  • NCLT Ahmedabad approved the Scheme of Amalgamation.
  • Registrar of Companies approved the name change application.
  • Name change effective from May 4, 2026.
  • New name to be used in all future company records.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Citizen Infoline Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [BPCL] BPCL Board Meeting on 12 May 2026 to Approve Financial Results
item.description:
Bharat Petroleum Corporation Ltd (BPCL) has announced that a meeting of its Board of Directors is scheduled for May 12, 2026, to consider and approve the financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company has also made the intimation available on its website. The trading window will remain closed until May 14, 2026.

  • BPCL board meeting scheduled for May 12, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve financial results for quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Intimation available on BPCL website.
  • Trading window closed until May 14, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARAT PETROLEUM CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AEL] Amba Enterprises Board Meeting Scheduled for May 12, 2026
item.description:
Amba Enterprises Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 12, 2026, to approve the audited financials and audit report for the year and quarter ended March 31, 2026. The board will also discuss the recommendation of a final dividend to shareholders. The trading window remains closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results.

  • Board meeting on May 12, 2026, to approve audited financials.
  • Final dividend recommendation to be discussed.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours post results declaration.
  • Financial results are for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amba Enterprises Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AMAGI] Amagi Launches In-Content Ads Marketplace for CTV Performance
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Amagi Media Labs Ltd has launched its In-Content Ads offering via the Amagi ADS PLUS marketplace, enabling advertisers to access unique ad formats stitched directly into linear video content in real-time. This expansion aims to enhance campaign results and grow ad revenue for content owners without disrupting the viewer experience. The marketplace includes ad formats like overlays, squeezebacks, and picture-in-picture ads and has seen success with a +2.9% lift in brand desirability and a +2.1 point increase in brand awareness in a recent collaboration.

  • Amagi launches In-Content Ads Marketplace via Amagi ADS PLUS.
  • New marketplace offers programmatic access to in-content ad formats.
  • Advertisers can access overlays, squeezebacks, and PIP ads.
  • Olyzon reports +2.9% brand desirability lift using Amagi's formats.
  • Marketplace gains traction with Plex, TCL, Telus, and Banijay.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amagi Media Labs Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [BPCL] BPCL Board Meeting on May 12, 2026 to Approve Financial Results
item.description:
Bharat Petroleum Corporation Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 12, 2026, to consider and approve the financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company has also made the intimation available on its website. The trading window will remain closed until May 14, 2026.

  • BPCL board meeting scheduled for May 12, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Intimation available on BPCL website.
  • Trading window closed until May 14, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARAT PETROLEUM CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [EMERALD] Emerald Finance partners with Goldkey Finvest for Early-Wage-Access
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Emerald Finance Ltd has partnered with Goldkey Finvest Pvt. Ltd. to offer its Early-Wage-Access program to employees. This initiative allows employees to access a portion of their salaries throughout the month, providing instant financial relief. The company aims to expand its offerings and serve retail customers by providing short-term loans as salary advances, collected through salary deductions.

  • Emerald Finance partners with Goldkey Finvest for Early-Wage-Access program.
  • The program allows employees to access part of their salaries early.
  • This partnership aims to provide instant financial relief to employees.
  • The amount lent will be collected through salary deduction.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Emerald Leasing Finance & Investment Company Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [JBCHEPHARM] JB Chemicals Board to Consider FY26 Results & Dividend
item.description:
JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 11, 2026, to consider and approve the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend on equity shares for FY 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 11, 2026.
  • To approve FY26 standalone and consolidated audited financial results.
  • Consideration of final dividend for FY26.
  • Dividend recommendation subject to shareholder approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: J.B.CHEMICALS & PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
